Name: Circinus Raiders
Description: Unlike the Circinus Federation, which at least pretends to be a functioning state, Circinus Raiders are little more than roaming warbands held together by greed, fear and warlord charisma.
ReputationStatements: A trial of combat! Yes! To win my affections back.
If you betray us, make sure you do it successfully. Failed betrayals tend to end very badly.
Mercenaries always ask questions. Raiders just burn things until the answers fall out.
Desperate worlds make easy prey. Don’t look so offended — you’re here too.
Many people want us dead. The feelings mutual. Here's the next on our list.
I'm starting to enjoy you, Commander. You've got raider instincts.
Hail, my delicious mercenary morsel. I've got a very special something in mind for you.
MissionSuccessStatements: Screams, burning mechs, chaos. Always satisfying.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Sometimes the prey bites back. Happens to all of us.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Out here, weakness attracts predators. Congratulations on advertising yours.
